ai_summary: Anupam Rasayan India Ltd. reported robust Q1 FY23 performance with 31% YoY revenue growth and stable EBITDA margins (26-28%), largely attributed to its cost-plus contract model and strategic inventory management amid global supply chain disruptions. The company is poised for sustained growth, evidenced by substantial Letters of Intent (LOIs) worth INR 2,620 crores and strategic investments in R&D and fluorination chemistry, with planned INR 250 crores CAPEX for FY23 fully covered by existing cash. No significant red flags are apparent, as the company demonstrates strong operational resilience and a clear growth trajectory with improving cost efficiencies from solar power investments.
